sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50479" key="i(mero/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱμερό-φρων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n50479.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lovely in spirit</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Doroth.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:3:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
